title: Message drone
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MessageDrone-FF115.png|thumb|right|250px|An ''Elegance'' message drone]]
'''Message drones''' were small automated [[Droid/Legends|droid]] ships used to relay confidential messages across interstellar distances in the days prior to the invention of the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]]. The [[Message pod|Cha'a message pod]] and the [[Elegance message drone|''Elegance'' message drone]] were two known types with the latter being used in the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], and to some extent, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 1]]
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}}
*''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Rule of Two (audiobook)}}
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''
